system_boundary_description: Explicit documentation clarifying grid interface configurations, input dependency cut-offs, and downstream losses.
Explicit documentation clarifying grid interface configurations, input dependency cut-offs, and downstream losses.

Retrofit or extension at an existing facility (e.g., CO₂ capture at existing point-source emitters). Excludes costs of the host plant. Grid interface configurations include connections to existing infrastructure; input dependencies limited to retrofit-specific inputs. Downstream losses beyond the extension's output boundary are excluded.
